AMI is the global leader in firmware, powering the world’s most advanced computing devices with our secure, stable, scalable and intelligent solutions. Whether you’re building hyperscale datacenters, AI factories or edge devices, AMI bridges the computing ecosystem – silicon vendors, ODMs, OEMs and CSPs – with modular firmware that simplifies integration, reduces time-to-market and future-proofs your platforms with AI-optimized intelligence and real-time insights. AMI redefines what’s possible from the firmware up.

excerpt.rendered: AMI is the global leader in firmware, powering the world’s most advanced computing devices with our secure, stable, scalable and intelligent solutions.
